conditions.rightValue: 面試|Interview|面談|初試|複試|面試通知|面談通知|interview|履歷推薦

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ ({model:'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001',max_tokens:500,messages:[{role:'user',content:'你是Sporton國際HR信件解析助手。只輸出JSON，不加任何說明文字。

HR人員：李沛晴(Peggy)、陳清彥(Yen)、黃友為(Evan)

請萃取以下欄位，輸出純JSON：
candidate_name: 候選人姓名(找不到填null)
applied_position: 應徵職位(找不到填未知職位)
department: 部門(找不到填未分類)
interview_date: 面試日期YYYY-MM-DD(找不到填null)
interview_time: 面試時間HH:MM(找不到填null)
round: 第幾輪面試(數字，預設1)
location: 面試地點(找不到填null)
hr_owner: 負責HR姓名(找不到填null)
status: 用繁中描述候選人當前狀態，例如：已推薦、面試已安排、複試已安排、取消面試、複試時間確認中、待主管回覆、已錄取
intent: 郵件意圖固定填以下其一：recommend(推薦尚未安排面試)|schedule(初試已安排)|update_time(更改面試時間)|cancel(取消面試)|second_schedule(複試已安排)|ask_schedule(詢問是否可安排面試複試)|other

主旨：' + $json.email_subject + '
內容：' + ($json.body_text||'').substring(0,1500)}]}) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO candidates (name, applied_position, department, source, status)
SELECT
  '{{ $json.candidate_name }}',
  '{{ $json.applied_position }}',
  '{{ $json.department }}',
  'Outlook歷史匯入',
  '{{ $json.status }}'
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM candidates WHERE name = '{{ $json.candidate_name }}'
);

UPDATE candidates
SET status = '{{ $json.status }}'
WHERE name = '{{ $json.candidate_name }}';

SELECT
  c.id AS candidate_id,
  '{{ $json.candidate_name }}' AS candidate_name,
  '{{ $json.interview_date }}' AS interview_date,
  '{{ $json.interview_time }}' AS interview_time,
  {{ $json.round }} AS round,
  '{{ $json.location }}' AS location,
  '{{ $json.hr_owner }}' AS hr_owner,
  '{{ $json.interview_status }}' AS status,
  '{{ $json.intent }}' AS intent,
  '{{ $json.email_subject }}' AS email_subject,
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id }}' AS email_msg_id,
  '{{ $json.email_web_link }}' AS email_web_link,
  '{{ $json.sender }}' AS sender,
  '{{ $json.received_at }}' AS received_at
FROM candidates c
WHERE c.name = '{{ $json.candidate_name }}'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO interviews (
  candidate_id, interview_date, interview_time, round,
  location, hr_owner, status, email_subject, email_msg_id, email_web_link
)
SELECT
  {{ $json.candidate_id }},
  NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date }}', 'null')::DATE,
  NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_time }}', 'null'),
  {{ $json.round }},
  NULLIF('{{ $json.location }}', 'null'),
  NULLIF('{{ $json.hr_owner }}', 'null'),
  '{{ $json.interview_status }}',
  '{{ $json.email_subject }}',
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.email_web_link }}', 'null')
WHERE '{{ $json.intent }}' NOT IN ('update_time', 'cancel')
  AND NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date }}', 'null') IS NOT NULL
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status;

UPDATE interviews SET
  interview_date = NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date }}', 'null')::DATE,
  interview_time = NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_time }}', 'null')
WHERE candidate_id = {{ $json.candidate_id }}
  AND round = {{ $json.round }}
  AND '{{ $json.intent }}' = 'update_time'
  AND NULLIF('{{ $json.interview_date }}', 'null') IS NOT NULL;

UPDATE interviews SET
  status = 'cancelled'
WHERE candidate_id = {{ $json.candidate_id }}
  AND round = {{ $json.round }}
  AND '{{ $json.intent }}' = 'cancel';

SELECT
  {{ $json.candidate_id }} AS candidate_id,
  '{{ $json.candidate_name }}' AS candidate_name,
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id }}' AS email_msg_id,
  '{{ $json.interview_status }}' AS status;

INSERT INTO email_logs (
  email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, candidate_id
)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id || '' }}',
  '{{ ($json.email_subject || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender || '' }}', ''),
  COALESCE(NULLIF('{{ $json.received_at || '' }}', '')::TIMESTAMPTZ, NOW()),
  'inserted',
  {{ $json.candidate_id }}
)
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO UPDATE SET 
  action = 'inserted', 
  processed_at = NOW();

INSERT INTO email_logs (email_msg_id, email_subject, sender, received_at, action, error_msg)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.email_msg_id }}',
  '{{ $json.email_subject }}',
  NULLIF('{{ $json.sender }}', 'null'),
  NOW(),
  'skipped',
  '非面試類信件'
)
ON CONFLICT (email_msg_id) DO NOTHING;
